properties.displayName: KLZ — Resource must carry a specific tag
properties.description: Audits or denies resources missing the tag named by the 'tagName' parameter. Mirrors the canonical Azure built-in pattern (single tag name) so it stays validatable by Azure Policy — the previous array-of-tag-names pattern with current() inside a field() accessor is REJECTED by Azure ('FIELD functions cannot contain additional runtime functions'). To enforce N required tags, reference this policy N times in the Foundry Enterprise Baseline initiative (once per tag). Each reference can promote Audit→Deny independently so high-priority tags (e.g. costCenter) move first.

metadata.description: Exact tag key that MUST be present on every taggable resource.
